'''Samiam''' was an [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Imperial]] [[Stormtrooper/Legends|stormtrooper]]. Stationed in a [[Tulon's task force|detachment]] under the command of [[Colonel/Legends|Colonel]] [[Beri Tulon]], Samiam was assigned to participate in the [[Massacre on Abridon]], but never got the chance as Tulon attempted to defect to the [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Rebel Alliance]], killing his entire squad, including Samiam.

==Behind the scenes==
Samiam's name was most likely inspired by the [[Wikipedia:Dr. Seuss|Dr. Seuss]] character [[Wikipedia:Green Eggs and Ham|Sam I Am]].

==Appearances==
*''[[Star Wars: Force Commander]]''
